codeReview.summary: Commit applies most requested component-level polish, but two hardcoded legacy colors explicitly called out by the feature remain in changed files.

issues.description: Crosshair line colors still use hardcoded "#555555" instead of the required white/38 equivalent (feature expected behavior required replacing hardcoded #555555).
Hardcoded "#9B9B9B" remains in table cell text, while feature expected behavior required replacing hardcoded #9B9B9B with white/65.

sharedStateObservations: Mission validation-state still marks VAL-FIX-004 and VAL-FIX-005 as pending; this review outcome is consistent with those assertions not yet being passed.
summary: Fail: b641da6 is close but does not fully satisfy the feature's explicit color-replacement requirements in price-chart.tsx and transactions-table.tsx.
